narrative:
Washington A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 492 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.6 percentage points.
